name: Amihan Gust 4T
shortDesc: High grade 4-stroke motorcycle engine oil. Reliable protection for daily riders.
description: The Bagani Amihan Gust 4T is a high-grade 4-stroke motorcycle engine oil formulated for reliable daily performance. SAE 40 viscosity provides consistent protection across a wide range of riding conditions.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! — the Amihan Gust meets JASO MA standards for excellent wet clutch compatibility.

features.title: Reliable Protection
features.desc: SAE 40 viscosity provides dependable engine protection for daily riding.

features.title: JASO MA Certified
features.desc: Full compatibility with wet clutch systems in most motorcycles.

features.title: Anti-Wear Formula
features.desc: Advanced additives reduce engine wear and extend engine life.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines for local riding conditions.

faqs.q: Is Amihan Gust good for daily commuting?
faqs.a: Yes, the Amihan Gust 4T is specifically formulated for daily riders who need reliable, consistent engine protection.

faqs.q: How often should I change the oil?
faqs.a: We recommend every 2,000-3,000 km under normal conditions, or every 1,500 km for heavy-duty use.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized motorcycle shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
